plssem 0.1.3
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Categorical Models with plssem
    • Higher Order Models
    • Interaction Models with plssem
    • Linear Models with plssem
    • Monte-Carlo Consistent Partial Least Squares
    • Handling Missing Values with plssem
    • Multilevel Models with plssem
    • Ordinal Regression with plssem
    • Parallel Bootstrapping with plssem
    • Unstandardized Estimates

randomInterceptsOrdered

Source: R/datasets.R
randomInterceptsOrdered.Rd

A simulated dataset.

Examples


syntax <- '
  f =~ y1 + y2 + y3
  f ~ x1 + x2 + x3 + w1 + w2 + (1 | cluster)
'

fit <- pls(syntax, data = randomInterceptsOrdered)
summary(fit)
#> plssem->fitMeasures():  
#>    Fit measures for MC-PLSc models are under development! Traditional fit 
#>    criteria will likely be too strict.
#> plssem->fitMeasures():  
#>    Resampling MC-PLSc Model (R = 1000000)...
#> plssem (0.1.3) ended normally after 54 iterations
#>   Estimator                              MCOrdPLSc-MLM
#>   Link                                          PROBIT
#>                                                       
#>   Number of observations                         10000
#>   Number of iterations                              54
#>   Number of latent variables                         1
#>   Number of observed variables                       9
#> 
#> Fit Measures:
#>   Chi-Square                                    10.841
#>   Degrees of Freedom                                10
#>   SRMR                                           0.003
#>   RMSEA                                          0.003
#> 
#> R-squared (indicators):
#>   y1                                             0.880
#>   y2                                             0.786
#>   y3                                             0.816
#> 
#> R-squared (latents):
#>   f                                              0.122
#> 
#> Latent Variables:
#>                  Estimate  Std.Error  z.value  P(>|z|)
#>   f =~          
#>     y1              0.938                             
#>     y2              0.887                             
#>     y3              0.903                             
#> 
#> Regressions:
#>                  Estimate  Std.Error  z.value  P(>|z|)
#>   f ~           
#>     x1              0.241                             
#>     x2              0.159                             
#>     x3              0.080                             
#>     w1              0.124                             
#>     w2              0.079                             
#> 
#> Covariances:
#>                  Estimate  Std.Error  z.value  P(>|z|)
#>   x1 ~~         
#>     x2              0.108                             
#>     x3              0.012                             
#>     w1              0.004                             
#>     w2              0.001                             
#>   x2 ~~         
#>     x3              0.097                             
#>     w1             -0.003                             
#>     w2             -0.002                             
#>   x3 ~~         
#>     w1              0.000                             
#>     w2              0.001                             
#>   w1 ~~         
#>     w2             -0.027                             
#> 
#> Thresholds:
#>                  Estimate  Std.Error  z.value  P(>|z|)
#>     y1|t1          -2.609                             
#>     y1|t2          -1.772                             
#>     y1|t3          -0.424                             
#>     y1|t4           0.321                             
#>     y1|t5           1.320                             
#>     y1|t6           2.382                             
#>     y2|t1          -2.851                             
#>     y2|t2          -1.895                             
#>     y2|t3          -0.967                             
#>     y2|t4           0.172                             
#>     y2|t5           1.039                             
#>     y2|t6           2.282                             
#>     y3|t1          -2.237                             
#>     y3|t2          -1.261                             
#>     y3|t3           0.006                             
#>     y3|t4           0.701                             
#>     y3|t5           1.789                             
#>     y3|t6           2.834                             
#>     x1|t1          -2.364                             
#>     x1|t2          -1.354                             
#>     x1|t3          -0.674                             
#>     x1|t4           0.501                             
#>     x1|t5           1.527                             
#>     x1|t6           2.538                             
#>     x2|t1          -2.908                             
#>     x2|t2          -2.007                             
#>     x2|t3          -0.996                             
#>     x2|t4          -0.118                             
#>     x2|t5           0.808                             
#>     x2|t6           1.913                             
#>     x3|t1          -2.935                             
#>     x3|t2          -1.944                             
#>     x3|t3          -0.833                             
#>     x3|t4          -0.152                             
#>     x3|t5           1.003                             
#>     x3|t6           2.261                             
#>     w1|t1          -2.802                             
#>     w1|t2          -2.024                             
#>     w1|t3          -0.957                             
#>     w1|t4           0.105                             
#>     w1|t5           1.241                             
#>     w1|t6           2.597                             
#>     w2|t1          -1.991                             
#>     w2|t2          -0.957                             
#>     w2|t3          -0.114                             
#>     w2|t4           0.747                             
#>     w2|t5           1.773                             
#>     w2|t6           2.468                             
#> 
#> Variances:
#>                  Estimate  Std.Error  z.value  P(>|z|)
#>    .f               0.878                             
#>     x1              1.000                             
#>     x2              1.000                             
#>     x3              1.000                             
#>     w1              1.000                             
#>     w2              1.000                             
#>    .y1              0.120                             
#>    .y2              0.214                             
#>    .y3              0.184                             
#>     f~1             0.615                             
#>
